goal: horizontal_composable[O1, M1, O2, M2, O3, M3](outer, id_h)

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x1: T2) { x0.dst_cat.identity(x0.obj_map(x1)) = identity_nat_trans_component[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x1) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](h, x)

goal: horizontal_compose_component[O1, M1, O2, M2, O3, M3](outer, id_h, x) = outer.src_functor.dst_cat.compose(outer.component(h.obj_map(x)), outer.src_functor.mor_map(h.dst_cat.identity(h.obj_map(x))))

goal: horizontal_composable[O1, M1, O2, M2, O3, M3](id_h, bwd)

whiskered_fwd.component(x) = horizontal_compose_component[O1, M1, O2, M2, O3, M3](id_h, fwd)(x)

horizontal_compose_component[O1, M1, O2, M2, O3, M3](id_h, bwd, x) = h.mor_map(bwd.component(x))
whiskered_bwd.component(x) = horizontal_compose_component[O1, M1, O2, M2, O3, M3](id_h, bwd)(x)

is_natural_isomorphism_pair[O1, M1, O3, M3](whiskered_fwd, whiskered_bwd) = (whiskered_fwd.src_functor = whiskered_bwd.dst_functor and whiskered_fwd.dst_functor = whiskered_bwd.src_functor and forall(x0: O1) { is_iso_pair[O3, M3](whiskered_fwd.src_functor.dst_cat, whiskered_fwd.component(x0), whiskered_bwd.component(x0)) })

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T3, T1, T2], x1: NaturalTransformation[T0, T3, T1, T2]) { forall(x2: T0) { is_iso_pair[T1, T2](x0.src_functor.dst_cat, x0.component(x2), x1.component(x2)) } = lib(natural_isomorphism).nat_iso_components_inverse[T0, T3, T1, T2](x0, x1) }[O1, O3, M3, M1](whiskered_fwd, whiskered_bwd)

not lib(natural_isomorphism).nat_iso_components_inverse[O1, M1, O3, M3](whiskered_fwd, whiskered_bwd) or forall(x0: O1) { is_iso_pair[O3, M3](whiskered_fwd.src_functor.dst_cat, whiskered_fwd.component(x0), whiskered_bwd.component(x0)) } = true

not forall(x0: O1) { is_iso_pair[O3, M3](whiskered_fwd.src_functor.dst_cat, whiskered_fwd.component(x0), whiskered_bwd.component(x0)) } or lib(natural_isomorphism).nat_iso_components_inverse[O1, M1, O3, M3](whiskered_fwd, whiskered_bwd)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { (x0.src_functor = x1.dst_functor and x1.src_functor = x0.dst_functor and lib(natural_isomorphism).nat_iso_components_inverse[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1)) = is_natural_isomorphism_pair[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) }[O1, M1, O3, M3](whiskered_fwd, whiskered_bwd)

not (whiskered_fwd.src_functor = whiskered_bwd.dst_functor and whiskered_bwd.src_functor = whiskered_fwd.dst_functor and forall(x0: O1) { is_iso_pair[O3, M3](whiskered_fwd.src_functor.dst_cat, whiskered_fwd.component(x0), whiskered_bwd.component(x0)) })

not (whiskered_fwd.src_functor = whiskered_bwd.dst_functor and whiskered_bwd.src_functor = whiskered_fwd.dst_functor) or not forall(x0: O1) { is_iso_pair[O3, M3](whiskered_fwd.src_functor.dst_cat, whiskered_fwd.component(x0), whiskered_bwd.component(x0)) }

not forall(x0: O1) { is_iso_pair[O3, M3](whiskered_fwd.src_functor.dst_cat, whiskered_fwd.component(x0), whiskered_bwd.component(x0)) } or whiskered_bwd.dst_functor != whiskered_fwd.src_functor or whiskered_fwd.dst_functor != whiskered_bwd.src_functor
exists(k0: O1) { not is_iso_pair[O3, M3](whiskered_fwd.src_functor.dst_cat, whiskered_fwd.component(k0), whiskered_bwd.component(k0)) }
let w0: O1 satisfy { not is_iso_pair[O3, M3](whiskered_fwd.src_functor.dst_cat, whiskered_fwd.component(w0), whiskered_bwd.component(w0)) }
function(x0: O1) { is_iso_pair[O3, M3](whiskered_fwd.src_functor.dst_cat, whiskered_fwd.component(x0), whiskered_bwd.component(x0)) }(w0)

goal: horizontal_composable[O1, M1, O2, M2, O3, M3](id_h, fwd) = (id_h.src_functor.src_cat = fwd.src_functor.dst_cat)

p.c: function(x0: NaturalTransformation[O1, M1, O3, M3]) { not exists(k0: NaturalTransformation[O1, M1, O3, M3]) { Option.some(x0) = horizontal_compose_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2, O3, M3](identity_nat_trans[O2, M2, O3, M3](h), fwd, src_comp, dst_comp) and Option.some(k0) = horizontal_compose_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2, O3, M3](identity_nat_trans[O2, M2, O3, M3](h), bwd, dst_comp, src_comp) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[O1, M1, O3, M3](x0, k0) } }(whiskered_fwd)
